$comment: Layer A for REBATE vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (file I/O stage 2b). The records generator draws a per-case record count (biased toward the empty file, the single record, and the maximum) and fills each record from the input file's fixed-width layout - each numeric field from its own PICTURE range, alphanumeric fields random text, fillers spaces. Failures shrink by dropping records first.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 REBATE (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-rebate, record-stream wrapper)
